creator: bacon@smithers.neuro.mcw.edu
text:
This is a new port for VTK5 (v5.0.2).  I opted not to use v5.0.3, because
another port (science/caret55) currently has some issues with it.  Thanks
in part to improvements in the VTK code, this port is much simpler than the
vtk4 series.  It also includes the VTK headers, TCL wrappers, and Python
wrappers in the base port, since these are commonly used, and not too
costly to build.  Java, examples, data, and testing are (currently) planned
as slave ports to come later (unless I hear a better suggestion).
